text:
— 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center unit count associated with accommodation 
revenue center codes 020X (all 9 subcategories) from all claims included in the stay. 

There is approximately a 20% error rate in the revenue center code category 0206 due to coders 
misunderstanding the term 'post ICU' as including any day after an ICU stay rather than just days in a 
step-down/lower case version of an ICU. 'Post' was removed from the revenue center code 0206
